content.headline: Athabasca Golf & Country Club
content.description_html:
Athabasca Golf & Country Club sits in the heart of Alberta's parkland, offering a full 18-hole championship experience at par 72. Located just off Highway 813 in Athabasca County, this course delivers a solid test of golf with nearly 6,000 yards of playable terrain and six distinct tee options to suit every skill level.

Whether you're a seasoned competitor or working on your game, the course layout accommodates golfers across the spectrum. Plan for a leisurely three-and-a-half-hour round to take in the experience and enjoy the Alberta landscape that surrounds you.

Raise a glass to your round with a Split the Tee laser-etched pint glass featuring Athabasca Golf & Country Club. It's the perfect way to remember your day on the course—or to toast a friend who plays here regularly.
bullets: Six tee options for all skill levels
18 holes in scenic Athabasca County, Alberta
